title: Helpful Ghasts (formerly Happy Airships)
description: Happy ghasts are cute, but they should be useful too.
body:
## Requires [VanillaBackport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) on 1.21.1, [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) on Neoforge
Happy ghasts are so cute, but they could use some functionality. This mod adds new items to make the happy ghast faster and stronger.

### Plated harnesses
A new type of harness which makes the happy ghast more resistant to attacks.

![harnesses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7d1f97fbc05bf89d2492c9471f7b7752acac6fd.png)

### Propeller
An item that can be attached to a harnessed happy ghast to increase speed.

![propeller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a886cec43590c7bbb1dfb545064be92757120af8_0.webp)

### Glide
An enchantment to increase the speed of the propeller.
